sys_script_include.description:
2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Fixed setProperty issue - this is ONLY used during setup 2.8.3HF | 2023-11-01 | DFCT0012259 - Who Can Run feature set to "TMs of the Template OU and Descendants" does not share to descendant TM 2.8.3HF | 2023-11-01 | DFCT0012260 - Who Can Run feature set to "All Members of Template OU and Descendants" does not share to descendant template users 2.8.3HF | 2023-10-23 | DFCT0012237 - Template page performance is slow for users in many OUs and for large org structures 2.8.3HF | 2023-10-02 | DFCT0012206 - OUTDs/TMs should not be able to see Global Templates 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-26 | STRY0145242 - Allow sharing to 'Ancestor' offices for "Who Can Run" in Templates 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-26 | DFCT0012187 - In "View Template" form, the "Who Can Run" option "All Members of the Template OU and its descendants" does not share the template to other PTD/OUTD/GTD users 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-25 | DFCT0012183 - In "View Template" form, the "Who Can Run" option "Task Managers of the Template OU and its Descendants" does not share the template to other TMs 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-20 | DFCT0012137 - Suspense date not default to 1700 per Tasker setting - install from internally DT app repository. (Seems to be still happening for Acknowledgement types) 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-15 | DFCT0012146 - Non-Template and Non-OUTD users cannot access OU templates even if "Flexible Template Run Permissions" is shared with them 2.8.3 (Tempate Updates Addon) STRY0141844 - DHS S&T - Permissions for running a template from a task 2.8.5 | 2023-04-04 - raj - STRY0136617 - Added check for sidebar on and enable chat 2.8.5 | 2022-12-23 - raj - DFCT0011531 - Group management error displayed ErrorServer JavaScript error "property" is not defined. This is a technical defect 2.8.5 | 2022-10-27 - raj - STRY0131148 - Add New Table for Tasker User in preparation for Out of Office 2.8.5 | 2022-11-04 - raj - changed to use gs.setProperty as the scope issue seems to be resolved as of San Diego
2.8.3 | 2023-07-02 - raj - DFCT0012071 - EH, defect: When creating a personal template as a TM, all permissive OU members are available for selection in the "select all" assignment fields (EX: Reviewer 2.8.3 | 2023-06-25 - raj - DFCT0012041 - Permissive OUs not included correctly in list of users that can be tasked 2.8.3 | 2023-06-10 - raj - DFCT0011913- Permissive OU office selection and member selections are available to all users in a controlled tasker setting even if that OU is outside their tasking pattern. 2.8.3 | 2023-05-29 - raj - DFCT0011596 - Number of records in "Open Task by My OU to Others" & "Tasks by My OU to Others" widget does not correlate with the actual number of records. 2.8.3 | 2023-05-29 - raj - DFCT0011596- Number of records in "Open Task by My OU to Others" & "Tasks by My OU to Others" widget does not correlate with the actual number of records. 2.8.3 | 2023-05-26 - raj - STRY0139617 - update for this story to handle case where Tasking is Open 2.8.3 | 2023-05-26 - raj - DFCT0011912 - Open/Matrixed TMs and Basic Users cannot task any other OUs in the Primary Assignee selection. 2.8 | 2022-09-22 - raj - STRY0130090 - 2.8 Certifier requested updates -10. Hardcoded Data : Avoid using hard-coded URLs in scripts. 2.8 | 2022-09-08 - raj - STRY0129041 - Block Search for User if Groups are Selected but aren't Configured 2.8 | 2022-09-08 - raj - STRY0129039 - OU Hierarchy Group Not Configured for Role Warning 2.8 | 2022-08-24 - raj - DFCT0011207 - Groups: TAA is unable to perform any actions, Groups Management" display an empty screen 2.8 | 2022-06-29 - raj - STRY0124857 - Use Groups Toggle (Enable/Disable Groups) 2.8 | 2022-06-29 - raj - STRY0124860 -Edit Group Names 2.8 | 2022-06-21 - raj - STRY0116257 - System Setting- Options for limiting available views and setting default "Task Form view" for New Task Forms 2.8 | 2022-06-02- bt - STRY0121937 - (Technical) New Function to return OU(s) where "I am a Task Manager and all descendants" and "I am a Task Manager and direct sub-offices" 2.8 | 2022-02-13 - raj - STRY0117523 - Org Hierarchy- Office Schedule Override- Add System Settings to turn on/off feature 2.8 | 2022-02-11 | raj | STRY0116257 - Simple Task Form- System Setting- Options for setting default for Task Page and Task Form view 2.7.3 | 2022-04-21 | raj | DFCT0010835 - Creating an "OU Template" with a "Restricted Group" causes the "Assignment" field filters to be incorrect 2.7.3 | 2022-04-21 | raj | DFCT0010826 - "Acceptance Overdue" Banner is NOT displayed to "Task Manager" or "Assigned Member" of task 2.7.2 | 2021-01-11 | raj | STRY0114645 - Base Task Form- Make the "Simple" Task Form the new "Standard" Task Form 2.7.2 | 2021-01-10 | raj | DFCT0010752- ServiceNow "Impersonation" no longer works correctly due to "Session Variable"
2.7.1 | 2021-12-07 | raj | DFCT0010681 - "Suspense Date Must be in the Future" - Task Form loses data on "Update" or "Create Task" 2.7.1 | 2021-12-10 | raj | DFCT0010681 -2 - Additional update to fix custom time moving to the next day 2.7.1 | 2021-12-11 | raj | DFCT0010669 - Tasks in Banner notifications does NOT redirect to the correct portal page configured in "Task Form Preference" 2.7.101 | 2021-12-28 | raj | DFCT0010732- Modern Portal filter "Open Request" for the "OU Request". GHA is unable to see the Requests - Added lookup for OU Member Administrators
v2.7 STRY0095102 - Stretch- HHS/ICE: The "Task" form and "Template" form field filters should account for users that have a "Parent" (Restricted) Group STRY0099083 - Add 4 new OOTB Tasker Portal filters that show tasks in OUs you are a member of STRY0099280 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the task. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new tasks. STRY0110317 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the Templates. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new Templates. STRY0112462 - HHS- Strong Matrix- Permissive OU Tasking- Task Form DFCT0010614 - If "Permissive OU" is ENABLED on any OU, but the "System Setting" is "OFF", users can still task everyone in that OU
2.5 P3 STRY0072032 - DIA: Vertical Task Tree - Tasker Setting for a systemwide setting - Vertical Tree structure on Task Tree View, Template Task Tree & Organizational Hierarchy Make all of these items client callable
sys_script_include.name: tasking_System_Settings_Scripts
